C:\mingw15.2\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\grid.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\grid.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\grid.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\grid.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\code\week07\grid\grid.exe -Wl,--out-implib,C:\code\week07\grid\libgrid.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\grid.dir\linkLibs.rsp
